name: Bardo Law, P.C.
description_short: Chicago-based consumer law firm specializing in debt defense, collection abuse litigation, and fair lending violations. Founded by attorney Stacy Bardo with 20+ years of experience.
description_long:
Bardo Law, P.C. was founded by Stacy Bardo, a consumer law attorney with over 20 years of experience in consumer protection litigation. The firm was established to address a systemic disparity Bardo observed: larger businesses filing numerous lawsuits against consumers who lack effective legal representation. Located in Chicago's Loop, the firm operates on the principle that consumers deserve individualized, timely, and empathetic legal advocacy without compromising the zealous and effective representation typically associated with larger law firms.

The firm offers a comprehensive range of consumer law services designed to help consumers fight back against unfair business practices. Their core practice areas include debt collection abuse litigation under the Fair Debt Collection Practices Act (FDCPA), debt defense for consumers being sued on debts, fair credit reporting disputes, consumer privacy and robo-call violations, auto finance fraud claims, wrongful repossession cases, and homeowner and tenant rights advocacy. The firm explicitly states it can recover statutory damages up to $1,000 plus actual damages and attorney's fees in FDCPA cases, and provides representation throughout Illinois with national associates available.

What distinguishes Bardo Law is its explicit focus on evening the playing field between individual consumers and larger businesses and creditors. The firm emphasizes compassionate delivery alongside aggressive litigation, with a stated commitment to putting "Chicago's Consumers First." Rather than operating as a high-volume bankruptcy mill, Bardo Law positions itself as a boutique consumer advocacy firm where the client comes first and receives personalized attention. The founder's 20+ years of dedicated experience in both individual and class action consumer cases reflects a deep specialization in this niche.

Honestly assessed, Bardo Law is a consumer litigation firm—not a bankruptcy filing service in the traditional sense. While the firm handles debt defense (which overlaps with bankruptcy preparation), the website does not prominently advertise Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing services. The firm appears strongest for consumers with viable litigation claims (collection abuse, credit reporting errors, predatory lending) rather than those simply needing debt elimination through bankruptcy discharge. Consumers needing straightforward bankruptcy filing may be better served elsewhere, though this firm could be valuable for those with both bankruptcy-adjacent debt issues and meritorious legal claims.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Founder has 20+ years of dedicated consumer law experience, not a newer practitioner
Can recover statutory damages up to $1,000 plus actual damages and attorney's fees in FDCPA cases at no cost to consumer
Explicitly handles both individual and class action cases, offering potential for broader relief
Located in Chicago Loop with availability throughout Illinois and national associate network
Specialized focus on debt defense with knowledge of statutes of limitations and debt amount verification
Addresses multiple consumer harm areas (collection abuse, credit reporting, auto fraud, wrongful repossession) rather than one narrow niche
Emphasis on individualized representation and empathetic advocacy rather than high-volume processing
cons: Website does not clearly advertise Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing services, suggesting this may not be primary focus
Geographic anchor to Illinois may limit accessibility for consumers in other states despite mention of national associates
No pricing information, fee structure, or contingency details provided on website to set consumer expectations
No client testimonials, case results, or success rate data published to demonstrate track record
Consumer must have a viable litigation claim (FDCPA violation, credit reporting error, etc.)—not suitable for simple debt elimination needs
best_for: Consumers being sued by debt collectors who may have FDCPA violations or statute of limitations defenses
Individuals with errors on credit reports who need legal advocacy to challenge reporting agencies and creditors
Consumers facing wrongful repossession or auto finance fraud with a need for aggressive litigation
Illinois residents with debt collection abuse or consumer fraud claims who want individualized representation
diagnosis: Bardo Law is best for Illinois consumers with active debt collection litigation, credit reporting disputes, or consumer fraud claims who need aggressive legal advocacy and have potential statutory damages claims. The main caveat: this is a specialized consumer litigation firm focused on defending against lawsuits and pursuing creditor violations—not a traditional bankruptcy filing service—so consumers seeking simple debt elimination through Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 discharge should clarify whether this firm handles those services before engaging.
services: Debt Collection Abuse litigation under Fair Debt Collection Practices Act (FDCPA)
Debt Defense for consumers being sued on outstanding debts
Fair Credit Reporting disputes and credit report error correction
Consumer Privacy violations and robo-call litigation
Auto Finance Fraud claims and representation
State and federal fair lending statute enforcement
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 203 N LaSalle St Suite 2100, Chicago, IL 60601
